sentences.text: Claude Code looks for a special notes file in your project — CLAUDE.
md — and reads it at the start of its work.
Think of it as a briefing you hand every new assistant: it's written in plain language, and you can ask Claude to create or update it for you.
Good things to put in it:
Your brand — colors, fonts, logo, spacing you like
Your tone — "warm and welcoming, never salesy"
Your rules — "always check the word list still works after a change"
How the project is organized, so Claude finds things fast
